title: Healing from Stage 3 HER2+Positive Breast Cancer
body:
Hello Everyone, 

In June of 2019 I found I had HER2+ Stage 3 breast cancer-three tumors in the breast and cancer on at least one of the lymph nodes under my arm. I chose to only do immunotherapy (targeted) along with a complete diet overall, supplements, Reiki, acupuncture, Chinese Medicine,  & spiritual and emotional healing. In December of 2019, I was found to be tumor free. I have done a few more immunotherapy treatments since then, but have stopped. I will have my scans again in late May. 

I've always known that my journey was never meant for me alone. I am in the process of chronicling my journey through the blog, Beyond Pink America: [www.beyondpinkamerica.com](https://www.beyondpinkamerica.com)  I write a lot about the power of food, listening to your own voice, God, and the body's innate ability to heal. While this is my story, it is my hope that it brings light to others too. 

Best, Kelly
